title: Table management
branchSubtitleEmpty: Select a branch to view tables

noBranch.title: No branch selected
noBranch.hint: Please select a branch to view and manage tables.

empty.none: No tables yet. Add a new table to get started.

form.createDesc: Create a new table for this branch.
form.notePlaceholder: e.g. VIP table by the window
form.alwaysAvailableHint: For virtual tables such as Takeaway: the table always shows as available, orders are not bound to the table — multiple open orders are managed in POS by tab/order.
form.qrOrderingHint: When enabled, guests can scan the table QR to browse the menu and place orders themselves. Disable to take orders only via staff.

confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

qr.title: QR for {{name}}
qr.desc: Print a table tent (shop name, QR, Wi‑Fi, bank transfer) for guests to scan and order.
qr.printBlocked: Browser blocked the print window. Allow popups.
qr.printScanHint: Scan to browse the menu and order
qr.printPayAtCounter: Pay at the counter when you leave
qr.configureBranchHint: Add Wi‑Fi and bank transfer details in Branch settings to print them on the table tent.
qr.regenerateConfirmMsg: Every printed QR for this table will stop working — you will need to reprint a new one.
qr.missing: This table has no QR token yet.
